series_metadata.series_description: Records contain information received from insurance companies os sspicious fires with losses of $5000.00 or greater.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: microfilm records four (4) years ; Electronic: electronic records indefinitely. ; Paper: paper copy in operating area scanned into machine readable format and data is entered into computer system. Upon confirmation that imaged copy has been checked quality and completeness, paper copy
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
